message:
test(raptorq): epoch replay logging + expanded deterministic golden vectors

Extend golden vector test suite with epoch-aware structured logging and
additional deterministic verification vectors (+424 lines):

- EpochReplayLog struct + emit_epoch_replay_log() for structured JSON
  output of repair/decode test results with epoch_id, object_hash,
  symbols_needed, verify_result, and fcp_error_code
- Additional seeded PRNG vectors with ChunkedObjectManifest integration
  testing chunk-level encode/decode roundtrips
- CBOR canonical serialization verification for encoded symbol payloads
- ChunkError handling coverage for corrupted/truncated inputs
- Import HashMap, chrono::Utc, Serialize/Deserialize, SchemaId for
  structured logging infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
